codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking failure: publish success now persists lastBackupPublishedAt/lastBackupReachedRelayCount to the profile record and Settings renders the required 'Last published: <relative> — reached N/M relays' indicator, with added unit and e2e coverage for null/non-null rendering and monotonic multi-publish behavior. No blocking regressions found against the original failure scope.

issues.description: After async publish persistence, `setActiveProfile(nextSummary)` is unconditional in the `existing` branch. If the active profile changes while publish is in flight (e.g., lock/switch), this can overwrite newer activeProfile state with stale data. The neighboring branches already guard on profile id, so this branch is inconsistent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: ui-screen-worker requires RED-first evidence (initial failing test run) for new tests, but this fix transcript shows creation of the new SettingsSidebar last-published test followed by passing runs only; no failing-run artifact is captured in the transcript/handoff verification list.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md:33,49; /tmp/fix_m6_publish_backup_metadata_transcript_skeleton.md:480 (test file create), 692 and 900 (passing vitest runs only)

summary: Reviewed fix feature transcript skeleton, handoff, prior failed review, and both commit diffs (05f2462799ba6540ab041151a4bc6f6d19cdc9c5 and c92a5f2).
